title: SMA Nitinol Actuator Closed-Loop Position Controller
description: Closed-loop position controller for a Joule-heated Nitinol SMA wire actuator. Uses asymmetric PID gains to compensate for martensite/austenite transformation hysteresis, monitors wire temperature to prevent degradation, displays state on OLED, and logs position and duty cycle to serial.
objective: Track position setpoint within ±1 mm over 0–40 mm stroke; maintain wire temperature ≤ 120 °C; log position, wire temp, and PWM every 100 ms; fault-cut drive on overtemperature.
constraints: Arduino Nano; DRV8833 driver; 0.5 mm Nitinol wire; linear potentiometer; OLED display; BOM < $30.
supporting_fact_titles: Nitinol Shape Memory Alloy Transformation Temperature and Actuation Hysteresis
design_element_titles: SMA Nitinol Wire DRV8833 H-Bridge Driver
NTC SMA Wire Temperature Clip Sensor
element_usage_notes: PWM duty from sma_hysteresis_pid fed to DRV8833 IN1; IN2 tied low for single-direction Joule heating
Potentiometer ADC reading averaged over 10 samples for position feedback
Wire NTC reading passed to sma_hysteresis_pid for overtemperature cutout logic
OLED updated at 5 Hz showing SP, PV in mm, duty %, and fault code

element_interactions.to: SMA Nitinol Wire DRV8833 H-Bridge Driver
element_interactions.description: Position feedback used by hysteresis PID to set SMA wire drive duty cycle

element_interactions.from: NTC SMA Wire Temperature Clip Sensor
element_interactions.to: SMA Nitinol Wire DRV8833 H-Bridge Driver
element_interactions.description: Wire temperature fed to PID function for thermal cutout; duty forced to 0 above 120 °C
Actual position displayed alongside setpoint on OLED

element_interactions.from: SMA Nitinol Wire DRV8833 H-Bridge Driver
element_interactions.description: Drive duty cycle displayed on OLED for operator monitoring
